Package com.aispect.agent.core

Class AbstractUnitAgent<T,R>

java.lang.Object
com.aispect.agent.core.AbstractUnitAgent<T,R>
Type Parameters:
T - method original parameters/return type context
R - Actual return result type
All Implemented Interfaces:
AiAgentFilter, AiExceptionProxy<T,R>, AiExecutionProxy<T,R>, AiPostExecutionProxy<T,R>, AiPreExecutionProxy<T>, AiUnitAgentHandler<T,R>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContentModerationAgent, DataCleanAgent, FallbackAgent, ImageProcessAgent, ImageStoryAgent, JsonExtractorAgent
public abstract class AbstractUnitAgent<T,R> extends Object implements AiUnitAgentHandler<T,R>
Abstract non-streaming agent processing base class.

    Called before the original method is executed, it is used for content review or pre-processing.

    Assertion filter: Based on the input parameters of the native method, determine whether the current call needs to go through AI Agent processing.

  • Method Details

    • shouldProcess

      public boolean shouldProcess(Object[] args)
      Description copied from interface: AiAgentFilter
      Assertion filter: Based on the input parameters of the native method, determine whether the current call needs to go through AI Agent processing.
      Specified by:
      shouldProcess in interface AiAgentFilter
      Parameters:
      args - method parameters
      Returns:
      Does it need to be processed?

    • doFilter

      public <T1, R1> R1 doFilter(AiInvocationContext<T1> ctx, AiExecutionProxy<T1,R1> next) throws AiSpectException
      Description copied from interface: AiAgentFilter
      filter/intercept the current AI Proxy request.
      Specified by:
      doFilter in interface AiAgentFilter
      Type Parameters:
      T1 - Method original return value type
      R1 - The type of final processing result expected
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context of the current method call
      next - Used to advance the filter chain, executing the next filter or the final AiExecutionProxy
      Returns:
      The final result after executing the filter chain and proxy
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Triggered when the interception logic rejects the request or a subsequent call chain throws an exception

    • preExecute

      public void preExecute(AiInvocationContext<T> ctx) throws AiSpectException
      Description copied from interface: AiPreExecutionProxy
      Called before the original method is executed, it is used for content review or pre-processing.
      Specified by:
      preExecute in interface AiPreExecutionProxy<T>
      Parameters:
      ctx - The interception context for the current method call
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Exceptions thrown during orchestration or underlying calls

    • postExecute

      public R postExecute(AiInvocationContext<T> ctx, R result) throws AiSpectException
      Description copied from interface: AiPostExecutionProxy
      Called after the original method is executed, it is used for post-processing, summarization or format conversion, etc.
      Specified by:
      postExecute in interface AiPostExecutionProxy<T,R>
      Parameters:
      ctx - The interception context for the current method call
      result - The execution result of the native method
      Returns:
      AI The final result after processing
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Exceptions thrown during orchestration or underlying calls

    • onException

      public R onException(AiInvocationContext<T> ctx, Throwable ex) throws AiSpectException
      Description copied from interface: AiExceptionProxy
      Called when the original method execution throws an exception, used for exception recovery, log collection, or downgrade response.
      Specified by:
      onException in interface AiExceptionProxy<T,R>
      Parameters:
      ctx - The interception context for the current method call
      ex - Exceptions thrown by native methods
      Returns:
      Return result after downgrade
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Exception that continues to be thrown when it cannot be handled

    • execute

      public R execute(AiInvocationContext<T> ctx) throws AiSpectException
      Description copied from interface: AiExecutionProxy
      Arrange the entire AI The calling process completely replaces the execution of native methods.
      Specified by:
      execute in interface AiExecutionProxy<T,R>
      Parameters:
      ctx - The interception context for the current method call
      Returns:
      AI The result after processing
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Exceptions thrown during orchestration or underlying calls
